violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Sani Buckets tested at 50 ppm QA. Buckets need to be tested & changed throughout the day to keep at proper concentration.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Insides and bottom shelves of front prep coolers in need of cleaning. Blizzard toppings and other debris building up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling tiles, light fixtures, TV monitors, and vent covers in back area in need of cleaning. Dust/debris buildup on many.
